title: prunus armeniaca
intro: Prunus armeniaca, also known as the apricot kernel tree, is a deciduous tree species in the rose family that produces edible apricot fruits and kernels. The medicinal properties of Prunus armeniaca include its high concentration of amygdalin, a compound that has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Prunus armeniaca kernel extracts include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Prunus armeniaca can be found in the form of kernel extracts, oil, and powder, which can be used to make capsules, tinctures, and topical creams.
